name: Tiramisu- Balducci's in New York City
recipeIngredient: 24 Ladyfingers, Toasted (in a 375°F oven for 15 minutes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange the ladyfingers on a plate and lightly soak them with the cooled espresso.
2. Place half of the soaked ladyfingers in one layer in a rectangular serving dish.
3. In a separate bowl, beat the egg whites with a wire whisk until stiff peaks form.
4. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into a mixture of yolks, sugar, mascarpone, Marsala wine, Triple Sec, Brandy, and Orange Extract.
5. Use half of this mixture to make a layer on top of the ladyfingers in the serving dish.
6. Sprinkle with half of the chopped chocolate.
7. Repeat the layers with another layer of soaked ladyfingers, mascarpone mixture, and chocolate.
8. Cover with tin foil and refrigerate for at least 1 hour before serving.
